revision.comment: Copied and modified the code from [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox]].
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

{{template doc}}

{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

<!--{{Ambox}} begin-->{{#switch:{{{small|}}}
| left = 
  {{Ambox/core

  | type       = {{{type|}}}
  | image      = {{#if:{{{smallimage|}}}
                 | {{{smallimage}}}
                 | {{{image|}}}
                 }}
  | imageright = {{#if:{{{smallimageright|}}}
                 | {{{smallimageright}}}
                 | {{{imageright|}}}
                 }}
  | style      = {{{style|}}}
  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}

                 | {{{smalltext}}} 
                 | {{{text}}} 
                 }}
  }}
| #default =

  | image      = {{{image|}}}
  | imageright = {{{imageright|}}}

  | text       = {{{text}}}

pass date to /core for display after text

move category code to subtemplate and remove undated
do not transclude doc if doc=no, to prevent template loops

fix nested indent
Override defaultsorts when categorising amboxes
Add nocat option like [[template:tmbox]]
link
from /sandbox per edit request
+add tracking categorty
more efficient code
do not automatically transclude documentation, per discussion
add talk page link functionality, as proposed on talk page
slight change to categorisation of ambox templates
tweak categorisation, if {{{name}}} parameter defined then no category unless on Template:{{{name}}}
implement separate parameters for issue and fix, use only issue in small form unless smalltext specified, adjust categories for article message templates
rename class, tweak categorisation
only show talk page link if talk page exists, add info parameter for additional information, make nocat=true work, tracking category adjustments
major rewrite, splitting code for small ambox, add section parameter
switch to Lua version

{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

 {{{text}}}

revision.comment: Updating to use "mbox-*" class names instead of "ambox-*". See [[Template talk:Mbox#Simpler to use class names]].
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|blank |   | {{#if:{{{image|}}} | {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | speedy = [[Image:Ambox speedy deletion.png|40x40px]] | serious | delete = [[Image:Ambox deletion.png|40x40px]] | content = [[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] | style = [[Image:Ambox style.png|40x40px]] | merge | move = [[Image:Ambox move.png|40x40px]] | protection = [[Image:Ambox protection.png|40x40px]] | notice | #default = [[Image:Ambox notice.png|40x40px]] }} }} }}
 {{{text}}}
{{{imageright}}}
{{#switch:{{{type|}}} | | speedy | delete | content | style | move | protection | notice = | #default = [[Category:Ambox templates using deprecated types|{{main other|Main:}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}]] }} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding the printing of an error message when invalid "type" parameter. Thus making it much easier to find which message box on a page is reporting an error.

revision.comment: Deploying the "small=left" feature, thus now using {{ambox/core}}. Tested in /sandbox and discussed in many places, see talk page.
Autocategorize article message box templates, per proposal
sort on pagename
remove category sortkey which is now the default after [[bugzilla:16552]]
Add code for incorrectly substed templates, or minor tidy up using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
revision.text:
<!--{{Ambox}} begin-->{{#switch:{{{small|}}}
| left = 
  {{Ambox/core
  | small      = left
  | type       = {{{type|}}}
  | image      = {{#if:{{{smallimage|}}}
                 | {{{smallimage}}}
                 | {{{image|}}}
                 }}
  | imageright = {{#if:{{{smallimageright|}}}
                 | {{{smallimageright}}}
                 | {{{imageright|}}}
                 }}
  | style      = {{{style|}}}
  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}
  | text       = {{#if:{{{smalltext|}}}
                 | {{{smalltext}}} 
                 | {{{text}}} 
                 }}
  }}
| #default = 
  {{Ambox/core
  | type       = {{{type|}}}
  | image      = {{{image|}}}
  | imageright = {{{imageright|}}}
  | style      = {{{style|}}}
  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}
  | text       = {{{text}}}
  }}
}}<!--

--><includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}|{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template|[[Category:Article message boxes]]}}}}</includeonly><!--

--><!--{{Ambox}} end--><noinclude>

{{pp-template}}
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding functionality for substitution detection and cleanup categorisation, per [[Wikipedia_talk:Manual_of_Style_(article_message_boxes)#Add_functionality_to_ambox|discussion]]
don't show documentation on sandbox or testcases
pass date to /core for display after text
display current date on template version, to demonstrate
fix my mistake
move category code to subtemplate and remove undated
do not transclude doc if doc=no, to prevent template loops
code by [[User:This, that and the other]] to add a unique HTML ID to all article maintenance tags, per ta
fix nested indent
Override defaultsorts when categorising amboxes
Add nocat option like [[template:tmbox]]
link
from /sandbox per edit request
+add tracking categorty
more efficient code
do not automatically transclude documentation, per discussion
add talk page link functionality, as proposed on talk page
slight change to categorisation of ambox templates
tweak categorisation, if {{{name}}} parameter defined then no category unless on Template:{{{name}}}
implement separate parameters for issue and fix, use only issue in small form unless smalltext specified, adjust categories for article message templates
rename class, tweak categorisation
only show talk page link if talk page exists, add info parameter for additional information, make nocat=true work, tracking category adjustments
major rewrite, splitting code for small ambox, add section parameter
switch to Lua version

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:20:52 on [[Template:Ambox]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

revision.comment: Deploying the "small=left" feature, thus now using {{ambox/core}}. Tested in /sandbox and discussed in many places, see talk page.
Autocategorize article message box templates, per proposal
sort on pagename
remove category sortkey which is now the default after [[bugzilla:16552]]
Add code for incorrectly substed templates, or minor tidy up using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
revision.text:
<!--{{Ambox}} begin-->{{#switch:{{{small|}}}
| left = 
  {{Ambox/core
  | small      = left
  | type       = {{{type|}}}
  | image      = {{#if:{{{smallimage|}}}
                 | {{{smallimage}}}
                 | {{{image|}}}
                 }}
  | imageright = {{#if:{{{smallimageright|}}}
                 | {{{smallimageright}}}
                 | {{{imageright|}}}
                 }}
  | style      = {{{style|}}}
  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}
  | text       = {{#if:{{{smalltext|}}}
                 | {{{smalltext}}} 
                 | {{{text}}} 
                 }}
  }}

revision.comment: adding functionality for substitution detection and cleanup categorisation, per [[Wikipedia_talk:Manual_of_Style_(article_message_boxes)#Add_functionality_to_ambox|discussion]]
don't show documentation on sandbox or testcases
pass date to /core for display after text
display current date on template version, to demonstrate
fix my mistake
move category code to subtemplate and remove undated
do not transclude doc if doc=no, to prevent template loops
code by [[User:This, that and the other]] to add a unique HTML ID to all article maintenance tags, per ta
fix nested indent
Override defaultsorts when categorising amboxes
Add nocat option like [[template:tmbox]]
link
from /sandbox per edit request
+add tracking categorty
more efficient code
do not automatically transclude documentation, per discussion
add talk page link functionality, as proposed on talk page
slight change to categorisation of ambox templates
tweak categorisation, if {{{name}}} parameter defined then no category unless on Template:{{{name}}}
implement separate parameters for issue and fix, use only issue in small form unless smalltext specified, adjust categories for article message templates
rename class, tweak categorisation
only show talk page link if talk page exists, add info parameter for additional information, make nocat=true work, tracking category adjustments
major rewrite, splitting code for small ambox, add section parameter
switch to Lua version

{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:12:17 on [[Template:Ambox]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

revision.comment: Planned new version from /sandbox. Many new additions and fixes. See discussions at [[Wikipedia talk:Article message boxes]].
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{imageright|}}} | }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image|}}}|none | |

=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

Revert. MZMcBride: You increased both the pre- and post-expand size, and made it less robust in several ways. I'll explain more on the talk page.

}}		 {{{text}}}

 {{{text}}}

<!--{{Ambox}} begin-->{{#switch:{{{small|}}}
| left = 
  {{Ambox/core

  | type       = {{{type|}}}

                 | {{{smallimage}}}
                 | {{{image|}}}
                 }}
  | imageright = {{#if:{{{smallimageright|}}}
                 | {{{smallimageright}}}
                 | {{{imageright|}}}
                 }}
  | style      = {{{style|}}}
  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}
  | text       = {{#if:{{{smalltext|}}}
                 | {{{smalltext}}} 
                 | {{{text}}} 
                 }}
  }}
| #default =

  | type       = {{{type|}}}
  | image      = {{{image|}}}
  | imageright = {{{imageright|}}}

  | textstyle  = {{{textstyle|}}}
  | text       = {{{text}}}

move category code to subtemplate and remove undated
do not transclude doc if doc=no, to prevent template loops

fix nested indent
Override defaultsorts when categorising amboxes
Add nocat option like [[template:tmbox]]
link
from /sandbox per edit request
+add tracking categorty
more efficient code

implement separate parameters for issue and fix, use only issue in small form unless smalltext specified, adjust categories for article message templates
rename class, tweak categorisation
only show talk page link if talk page exists, add info parameter for additional information, make nocat=true work, tracking category adjustments
major rewrite, splitting code for small ambox, add section parameter
switch to Lua version

{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|none| | }} {{#if:{{{imageright|}}}| }}
{{#ifeq:{{{image}}}|blank| | {{#if:{{{image|}}}| {{{image}}} | {{#switch:{{{type|}}} | serious = [[Image:Stop hand nuvola.svg|40px]] | content = [[Image:Emblem-important.svg|40px]] | style = [[Image:Broom icon.svg|40px]] | merge = [[Image:Merge-arrows.svg]] | notice = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] | #default = [[Image:Info non-talk.png|40px]] }} }} }} {{{text}}}{{{imageright}}}
=== The article message box meta template === This page is the meta template "ambox" that uses CSS classes for pretty much all its looks and that uses default images and has some other nifty features. For usage demonstration, parameter explanations, the CSS code you need and more, see [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation/issuebox demo]]. --[[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]] ([[User talk:Davidgothberg|talk]]) 10:02, 9 September 2007 (UTC)

revision.comment: Deploying the "small=left" feature, thus now using {{ambox/core}}. Tested in /sandbox and discussed in many places, see talk page.
Autocategorize article message box templates, per proposal
sort on pagename
remove category sortkey which is now the default after [[bugzilla:16552]]
Add code for incorrectly substed templates, or minor tidy up using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
revision.text:
<!--{{Ambox}} begin-->{{#switch:{{{small|}}}
| left =

revision.comment: adding functionality for substitution detection and cleanup categorisation, per [[Wikipedia_talk:Manual_of_Style_(article_message_boxes)#Add_functionality_to_ambox|discussion]]
don't show documentation on sandbox or testcases
pass date to /core for display after text
display current date on template version, to demonstrate
fix my mistake
move category code to subtemplate and remove undated
do not transclude doc if doc=no, to prevent template loops
code by [[User:This, that and the other]] to add a unique HTML ID to all article maintenance tags, per ta
fix nested indent
Override defaultsorts when categorising amboxes
Add nocat option like [[template:tmbox]]
link
from /sandbox per edit request
+add tracking categorty
more efficient code
do not automatically transclude documentation, per discussion
add talk page link functionality, as proposed on talk page
slight change to categorisation of ambox templates
tweak categorisation, if {{{name}}} parameter defined then no category unless on Template:{{{name}}}
implement separate parameters for issue and fix, use only issue in small form unless smalltext specified, adjust categories for article message templates
rename class, tweak categorisation
only show talk page link if talk page exists, add info parameter for additional information, make nocat=true work, tracking category adjustments
major rewrite, splitting code for small ambox, add section parameter
switch to Lua version
